get.description: This endpoint retrieves a list of task events based on the provided start and end date range. Optionally, it can also filter task events by a specific user ID.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Start date for fetching task events (format: YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: End date for fetching task events (format: YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Filter events by specific user ID.

200.description: Successful response containing task events data.

500.description: Internal server error if an issue occurs while fetching task events.

get.description: This endpoint allows exporting clocking data for a given date range to an Excel file. If no dates are provided, the system will use the 'start_date' and 'end_date' query parameters.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The start date of the clocking data range (format: YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: The end date of the clocking data range (format: YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Optional query parameter to specify the start date if not provided in the URL path.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Optional query parameter to specify the end date if not provided in the URL path.

200.description: Successful response with clocking data exported to Excel.

500.description: Internal server error if the export operation fails.

get.description: Retrieve a list of folders, with optional search and sorting capabilities.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term to filter folders by name or description.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Field to sort the results by (e.g., name, created_at, workbooks_count).

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Sort order for the results (asc or desc).

200.description: Successful response with a list of folders.
